overview.value: Rubber Plant has broad glossy leaves and a strong upright shape. It becomes a bold indoor tree when given bright filtered light and consistent watering.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Rubber Plant","overview":"Rubber Plant has broad glossy leaves and a strong upright shape. It becomes a bold indoor tree when given bright filtered light and consistent watering.","tips":"Dust the large leaves often and rotate the pot for even growth."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"橡皮树","overview":"橡皮树有宽大油亮的叶片和挺拔株型。在明亮散射光和稳定浇水下，它能长成很有存在感的室内小树。","tips":"经常清洁大叶片，并定期转盆，让植株受光更均匀。"}}
